prompt: A 3D render of a cute kawaii {argument name="subject" default="cloud"} character on a pure white background. The character has a soft, matte, squishy texture resembling clay or a stress toy. It features large glossy black eyes with white highlights, a simple curved smile, and round pink blush on its cheeks. The edges and bottom of the figure have a subtle pastel gradient of {argument name="accent colors" default="pink, blue, and purple"}. Soft studio lighting, minimalist icon style, casting a gentle shadow.
translatedPrompt: A 3D render of a cute kawaii {argument name="subject" default="cloud"} character on a pure white background. The character has a soft, matte, squishy texture resembling clay or a stress toy. It features large glossy black eyes with white highlights, a simple curved smile, and round pink blush on its cheeks. The edges and bottom of the figure have a subtle pastel gradient of {argument name="accent colors" default="pink, blue, and purple"}. Soft studio lighting, minimalist icon style, casting a gentle shadow.

breakdown.creativeCore: Kawaii 3D Character Icon：Generates a cute, 3D-rendered kawaii character with a soft matte texture on a white background, perfect for app icons or avatars.
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, minimalist, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
